test.name: Storage Capacity E2E Flow

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: Login As Demo User
New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Logs in as the default Demo User (ID 1) via the development login page

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: Expected exactly 1 storage for enter key submit, but found ${found_enter_count}

kw.doc: Closes a Context.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Close the browser context to finalize the video, then embed it in the log/report.

test.doc: Test adding and deleting storage capacities
